vulnerabilities.fix: Implement middleware to sanitize inputs before processing them in your schemas.

vulnerabilities.description: No sign of Helmet or CORS Middleware setup.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Helmet and CORS configuration to secure your Express application.
Ensure JWT tokens have secure configurations, such as short expiration times and proper algorithms.
Implement rate limiting to your API to mitigate brute force attacks.
Audit logging configuration to ensure secrets are not logged, and switch to secure logging frameworks.
